tour.dashboard_description.defaultValue: This is your business command center. Track everything that matters in one place.

tour.daily_goal_description.defaultValue: Aim high! Set a daily sales target to keep yourself motivated and track your progress.

tour.buzz_description.defaultValue: Get smart insights about your business - low stock alerts, overdue payments, and quick summaries.

tour.cash_flow_description.defaultValue: See all your money coming in and going out. Know your financial health at a glance.

tour.credit_description.defaultValue: Keep track of customers who owe you money. Never forget a payment again!

tour.credit_sales_description.defaultValue: When a customer buys on credit, record it here to stay organized.

tour.add_product_description.defaultValue: Click here to add new products to your inventory.

tour.services_description.defaultValue: List all the services you offer. Help customers know what you provide.

tour.add_service_description.defaultValue: Click here to add a new service to your business offerings.

tour.ingredients_description.defaultValue: Track your ingredients and supplies. Never run out of what you need.

tour.add_ingredient_description.defaultValue: Add ingredients to your kitchen inventory.

tour.calendar_description.defaultValue: View and manage all your appointments in one place.

tour.add_appointment_description.defaultValue: Schedule new appointments and manage your bookings.

tour.trips_description.defaultValue: List all your transport routes and services.

tour.jobs_description.defaultValue: Track all your tailoring jobs and measurements.

tour.projects_description.defaultValue: Track all your freelance projects and deliverables.

tour.beehive_description.defaultValue: Connect with other business owners, share experiences, and get helpful tips.

tour.more_tools_description.defaultValue: Additional features to help you run your business like a pro!

common.payment_due_note.defaultValue: Payment due date (default: 30 days from today)

tour.history_description.defaultValue: Review past transactions to make smarter business decisions.

tour.stock_alerts_description.defaultValue: Get notified when items are running low so you can restock on time.

tour.payments_description.defaultValue: Mark when customers pay you back. Keep your cash flow healthy!

tour.share_description.defaultValue: Help others by sharing your business experiences and learn from the community.

tour.sales_description.defaultValue: Analyze your sales patterns and make data-driven decisions.

tour.target_description.defaultValue: Set and track your daily sales goals right here. The progress bar shows how close you are to hitting your target!

tour.money_description.defaultValue: Quickly record sales (Money In) and expenses (Money Out) with these convenient buttons.

tour.credit_preview_description.defaultValue: See customers who owe you money at a glance. Tap to view full details and manage payments.

tour.inventory_preview_description.defaultValue: Quick view of your stock levels. Get alerts when items are running low.
